strategy_used: Graph Strategy: We currently have no Twitter-derived data about Nvidia (NVDA) for today. The highest-priority gaps are: (1) real-time market sentiment and volume of conversation, (2) official company messaging or news that could move the stock today, and (3) commentary from high‑reach financial news accounts and influencers. The next round should therefore collect a broad set of Twitter signals (latest public mentions and top tweets), authoritative timelines (company + major financial outlets/influencers), and trending context. This plan uses multiple endpoints to satisfy the diversity rule and enables a follow-up deep dive on any high-engagement tweet or thread identified.
